scale.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl tracking-tighter font-bold text-slate-900
scale.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl tracking-tight font-semibold text-slate-900

components.navigation: Sticky top-0 z-50 bg-white border-b border-slate-100 shadow-sm. Logo left, Links center, CTAs right. Mobile hamburger menu required.
components.emergency_banner: Fixed or absolute at the very top. Background red-600, text white. 24/7 Emergency contact info.

buttons.primary: bg-emerald-800 text-white hover:bg-emerald-900 rounded-xl px-6 py-3 font-medium transition-colors
buttons.secondary: bg-teal-700 text-white hover:bg-teal-800 rounded-xl px-6 py-3 font-medium transition-colors
buttons.accent: bg-red-600 text-white hover:bg-red-700 rounded-xl px-6 py-3 font-medium transition-colors
buttons.outline: border-2 border-emerald-800 text-emerald-800 hover:bg-emerald-50 rounded-xl px-6 py-3 font-medium transition-colors

components.cards: bg-white rounded-2xl shadow-sm border border-slate-100 overflow-hidden hover:shadow-md transition-all. Use solid flat surfaces, NO glassmorphism.
components.floating_actions: Fixed bottom right. Stacked vertical buttons for Call, WhatsApp, Book. Mobile friendly.
components.hero: Split layout or image with solid overlay box. No heavy gradients over the whole image. Ensure text contrast.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure APCA/WCAG AA minimums. White text on Primary Green/Teal/Red.
accessibility.testing: All interactive elements and key info MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case. Example: data-testid='book-appointment-btn'
accessibility.motion: Respect prefers-reduced-motion. Keep animations subtle (opacity and slight transform).

instructions_to_main_agent: Build frontend-only React Router application as requested.
Ensure Emergency Banner is visible across all routes.
Use solid background colors (avoid glassmorphism and heavy gradients).
Add 'data-testid' to all buttons, links, and forms.
Use the provided image URLs to populate placeholder content without using text-based dummy image generators.
